title: gavilea wittei
intro: Gavilea wittei, also known as Witte's Gavilea, is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family that is native to New Zealand. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving respiratory health. Gavilea wittei can be prepared in various herbal preparations, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
